blocker: Monitors require approved Webset IDs, working Websets API access, and explicit REST/API or host-automation approval. The configured Exa key currently fails Websets API access with 401, so no parent Websets can be created yet.
creation_policy: do not create monitors until at least one parent Webset exists and a manual run produces acceptable signal quality
